headline1: I didn't start this to become a
headline2: I started because I was tired.
subtitle: Tired of being confused about what "healthy" even meant. Tired of doing everything "right" and still feeling off. So I stopped chasing perfection — and started focusing on something simpler.
chip2: Based in Ho Chi Minh City
storyBody: I grew up in Vietnam eating real food — fresh herbs, fermented vegetables, broths that took hours. Then life got busy, and somehow I ended up in a cycle of diets, supplements, and conflicting advice. It took years to come back to what I already knew: simple, whole food, eaten with intention.
philBody: Healthy eating isn't a personality. It's a practice — and like any practice, it gets easier the more you show up for it. I'm not here to give you a meal plan. I'm here to help you build a relationship with food that actually lasts.
bookSub: Book a 1:1 coaching session — 45 minutes, personalised guidance, no scripts.
newsSub: Recipes, wellness reads, and real talk — weekly in your inbox.
